collection_initial_render.description: A meaningful collection behavior can be proven by injected config, cards, or filters on first render.

interaction_or_state.description: A meaningful behavior needs a click, typing, navigation, history, or another controlled state transition.

visual_only.description: The change is primarily pixel-level appearance and has no meaningful structural DOM assertion.

a11y_only.description: The change is limited to accessibility labels, roles, or attributes in the current QA scope.

viewport_only.description: The behavior is specific to viewport or responsive layout coverage.

performance_only.description: The change is performance-only and has no deterministic functional browser assertion.

non_product_runtime.description: The change is tooling, build, CI, dependency, logging, or another non-visitor runtime concern.

neededCapabilities: manual review to confirm behavior-preserving source refactor
refactor_only.description: Production source was reorganized without an intended visitor-visible behavior change; keep it reviewable until that claim is confirmed.

neededCapabilities: manual QA contract triage with complete PR evidence
needs_review.description: The bounded evidence is incomplete or does not safely fit a reviewed scope.
